mapper.sql: id, paper_id, in_out, author, author_name, author_unit, author_code, author_type, author_dept_id, author_account, author_unit_name, author_division, sex, ranking, is_corr_author, edu_degree, edu_level, title, work_ratio, note, is_student, id_no, bank, bank_account, contact_tel, is_tied_corr_author
mapper.select:
select spa.author as rowId,spa.author_name as authorName,spa.author_type as authorType, spa.author_code as authorCode, spa.sex,spa.edu_degree as eduDegree,spa.edu_level as eduLevel,spa.title as title from srm_paper_author spa where paper_id=#{paperId}
ranking="01"
is_corr_author=1
author_type=1
order by ranking ASC LIMIT 1
select count(*) from srm_paper_author where paper_id=#{paperId}

select spa.id as rowId, spa.author as author, puser.name as authorName, spa.author_type as authorType, ccspt.name as authorTypeName, spa.author_code as authorCode, spa.sex as sex, case when spa.sex=0 then '女' when spa.sex=1 then '男' else '' END as sexName, spa.edu_degree as eduDegree,csed.name as eduDegreeName, spa.edu_level as eduLevel,csel.name as eduLevelName, spa.title as title,ccsti.name as titleName, sauthororder.code as ranking,sauthororder.name as rankingName, spa.is_corr_author as isCorrAuthor,spa.work_ratio as workRatio from srm_paper_author spa left join ct_srm_user puser on puser.id=spa.author left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=spa.author_dept_id left join ct_srm_person_type ccspt on ccspt.code=spa.author_type left join ct_srm_title_info ccsti on ccsti.code=spa.title left join ct_srm_edu_degree csed on csed.code=spa.edu_degree left join ct_srm_edu_level csel on csel.code=spa.edu_level left join ct_srm_paper_author_order sauthororder on sauthororder.code=spa.ranking where paper_id=#{paperId}
